productDisplayName: Mumbai Slang Women Floral Pink Kurti
description: Style Note Looking to combine the ethnic look with contemporary styling in your outfit? These kurtis from mumbai slang are just what you need to give your casual wear the comfort quotient. Wear this kurti with a pair of figure hugging jeans and carry a stylish tote to finish off your outfit. Product Details White printed short kurti with onion pink and black floral print, has long sleeves, mandarin collar with a split V neckline, ruffles around the neckline, drawstring tie at the hip for better Fit and tucks around the yoke Material and Care Blended cotton Wash using mild detergent Do not dry in direct sunlight Do not bleach Do not iron directly on print or embroidery Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
